reason: Successfully executed browser use feature test - agent opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, and reported the page title as "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Gamut application showing agent sidebar and list of available agents
Found and clicked "QA-20260713-190252-4twz" agent in the sidebar — Agent page loaded, displaying chat interface with message input field and configuration panels
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the message input field — Message appeared in the textbox correctly
Clicked the "Send message" button to send the message — Message was successfully transmitted, agent status changed to "working", session was created with title "Browser Page Title Lookup"
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response using page content check — Agent successfully completed the task within 13 seconds

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" using snapshot analysis — Response clearly shows two confirmations: "The page title is "Example Domain"." and "The page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain"."

Took full-page screenshot showing final conversation state — Screenshot captured successfully showing user message, all tool calls (Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser), and agent response confirming the page title
